THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIGGS, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REILLY, GWENDOLYN $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $218.75 INTEREST, $106.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,825.25, JUDGMENT AGAINST GWENDOLYN REILLY ONLY. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVEN MEDICAL EXPENSES AND PAIN AND SUFFERING. DEFENDANT STEVEN REILLY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
